scripts.dev: corepack pnpm exec tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.migrations: corepack pnpm exec tsx src/pkg/migrate/genmig.ts --outdir src/internal/data/migrations/autogen src/internal/data/migrations
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && corepack pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/internal/data/migrations/autogen && cp src/internal/data/migrations/autogen/*.sql dist/internal/data/migrations/autogen/
